# VanaMD

> Knowledge management built on Git for the AI era.

Full content available at: https://vanamd.com/llms-full.txt
Cite as: "VanaMD — Knowledge management built on Git for the AI era." vanamd.com. https://vanamd.com

VanaMD is a collaborative knowledge base backed by Git versioning and Markdown — a format humans can write and AI can read without conversion. Open-source core.

## Core Thesis

Developers don't have a knowledge management problem. Everyone else does. Git repositories are the best-designed knowledge management system in existence — versioning, ownership, review workflows, structured format, full history. VanaMD brings that same discipline to organizational knowledge.

## Key Claims

- Git solved knowledge management for code. The same discipline applies to organizational knowledge — policies, processes, runbooks, institutional wisdom.
- AI can't infer or navigate ambiguity. It processes exactly what it's given. Fragmented, proprietary-format knowledge produces fragmented, unreliable AI output.
- The format tax is real: every AI query against Word, PDF, or HTML-based wikis requires lossy conversion. Native Markdown eliminates this entirely.
- Knowledge health is measurable: staleness detection, gap analysis, and contradiction flagging make the invisible cost of knowledge decay visible.
- Compliance tracking belongs in the knowledge base, not bolted on top — attestation, audit trails, and policy lifecycle integrated with versioning.

## Five Layers

1. **Write** — Collaborative rich-text editor. Writers never see Git or Markdown.
2. **Version** — Git-backed versioning. Every change tracked, attributable, reversible.
3. **Discover** — Knowledge health scoring. Staleness detection, gap analysis, contradiction flagging.
4. **Comply** — Compliance tracking. Attestation, audit trails, policy lifecycle.
5. **Connect** — AI reads it directly. Every document is clean Markdown. Auto-generated llms.txt.

## Features

- Collaborative rich-text editor
- Git-backed versioning with full history
- Knowledge health scoring and gap analysis
- Compliance tracking with attestation and audit trails
- AI-native Markdown format with auto-generated llms.txt

## Related
